step.question: Show the ids of high schoolers who have friends and are also liked by someone else.

payload.analysis_goal: find high schooler IDs who have at least one friend and are liked by at least one other high schooler
assumptions: Only synced local schema metadata is trusted.

raw_plan.intent: find high schooler IDs who have at least one friend and are liked by at least one other high schooler

payload.sql: SELECT highschooler.ID AS student_id FROM highschooler JOIN friend ON highschooler.ID = friend.student_id JOIN likes ON highschooler.ID = likes.liked_id LIMIT 100

answer.answer: The query returned 14 high schooler IDs who both have friends and are liked by someone else. The IDs range from 1101 to 1934. A sample of the results includes: 1101, 1247 (appears twice), 1304, and 1468.
